disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe upper-abdominal pain that bores straight through to the back, starting about 6 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and where does it go?
When did the pain start and how did it come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started suddenly about six hours ago — a horrible deep pain in the top of my tummy that goes right through to my back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain partly eased by sitting up and leaning forward; worse lying flat
trigger_question_examples: Is there any position that makes the pain better or worse?
Does lying down change the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: If I sit up and lean forward it eases a tiny bit; lying flat makes it much worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse, unrelenting vomiting of bilious fluid with retching even when the stomach is empty; unable to keep down any fluid
trigger_question_examples: Have you been vomiting, and can you keep any fluids down?
What does the vomit look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't stop throwing up — it's greenish-yellow and I keep retching even when there's nothing left. I can't keep a single sip of water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known past history of symptomatic gallstones
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any known gallbladder or stomach problems?
Have you ever been told you have gallstones?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I've been told I have gallstones and they've given me trouble before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Caregiver notices the whites of the eyes look slightly yellow
trigger_question_examples: Does her skin or the whites of her eyes look yellow?
Any change in the colour of her eyes or skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, the whites of her eyes look a bit yellow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels very lightheaded and weak on trying to sit up or stand
trigger_question_examples: Does she feel dizzy or faint when she moves?
How does she feel when she tries to stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She goes really dizzy and weak whenever she tries to sit up or stand.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels hot, sweaty and clammy with a racing heart
trigger_question_examples: Does she feel feverish or sweaty?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She feels really hot and clammy and says her heart is pounding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in the vomit and no black tarry stools reported at this point
trigger_question_examples: Is there any blood in the vomit, or has it looked like coffee grounds?
Have her stools been black or tarry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blood that we've seen in the vomit, and no black stools.

trigger_question_examples: How much alcohol has she had recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She hasn't been drinking — no significant alcohol recently.
